name: Below Benni's
short_description: While urban exploring a long-forgotten bakery, the floor collapses beneath you and traps you underground. Now you must find a way out — as it seems something else has been trapped down there all this time.
detailed_description:
Step into the shoes of an urban explorer taking photos and videos of derelict facilities deep in the American South. You sneak into Benni's Bakery, a long-forgotten bakery that once stood as a pillar of the small town’s community — now left to rot and crumble under time's weight. What starts as a routine exploration of a decaying relic quickly spirals into something far more sinister.

While exploring, the floor gives way and send you, the explorer, tumbling down below. You awaken disoriented in a network of tunnels used for storage and production, a hidden underbelly beneath Benni’s — and you're not alone.

Something else has been trapped down here all this time. And it knows you’re here.

Now, with only a flickering flashlight and your wits to guide you, you must navigate the claustrophobic passageways but time is running out. As you move, you are being hunted. A broken speaker, the scrape of metal on concrete, and fleeting shadows are constant reminders that you are being watched and stalked. Keep running, stay quiet and never let your guard down.

Key Features:

🔦 Atmospheric Horror Exploration — Immerse yourself in a chilling, detail-rich environment filled with environmental storytelling and eerie remnants of the past.

📍 Dynamic Tunnels and Secret Areas — Navigate twisting corridors, hidden rooms, and forgotten offices beneath the bakery, each holding clues and dangers.

👤 Stealth-Based Survival — Avoid what lurks in the shadows using stealth and strategy. You won’t survive a direct encounter — staying on the move is your only hope.

📜 Uncover a Disturbing Story — Piece together the mystery of Benni’s through scattered notes, recordings, and environmental clues.

🎧 Immersive Sound Design — 3D audio and a reactive soundscape keep you constantly on edge, with every creak, whisper, and footstep adding to the tension.

Gameplay:

An atmospheric survival horror experience with dungeon crawler-inspired movement and level design. Explore, unlock doors, restore old machinery, and scavenge for vital items to escape — all while evading a relentless threat that only moves when you’re not watching.

Move - WASD

​Interact - E

Inventory - Q

Map - SPACE

Pause - ESC
